meta.title: Happy Horse 1.0 AI Video Generator | Dommi
meta.description: Use Happy Horse 1.0 in Dommi to create AI video with strong motion, native audio awareness, and practical image-to-video or text-to-video workflows. Choose Happy Horse 1.0 when you want an open-video baseline with ambitious motion; compare it with Seedance 2.0 for cinematic control and LTX for open-source workflows.

examples_section.intro: Start with these prompts to test performance shots, chase scenes, product movement, and the kind of subject motion Happy Horse is known for.
examples_section.attribution: Showcase clips from happyhorse.video's official Happy Horse 1.0 gallery.

items.title: Performance / character motion — stage close-up
items.prompt: A K-pop performer with long silver hair in a glossy pink-and-silver mini-dress, mid-dance on a neon-lit stage. Camera tracks slightly upward as she lands a pose, stage lights flare in the background, slow-motion at the beat drop, vertical 9:16 frame.
items.result_alt: Happy Horse 1.0 K-pop stage performance clip

items.title: Cinematic narrative — handheld tracking shot
items.prompt: A man in a mustard-yellow t-shirt sprints away from camera down a long, brightly-lit modern hotel corridor. Handheld camera follows just behind in a single take, motion blur on the walls, warm overhead lighting, urgent breathing audio. 16:9, 6 seconds.
items.result_alt: Happy Horse 1.0 hotel corridor chase clip

items.title: Stylized animation — anime fantasy chase
items.prompt: Anime fantasy scene. A black-cloaked warrior with a long blade leaps mid-stride through an autumn forest in pursuit of a small fox-like creature darting through fallen orange leaves. Dynamic side-tracking camera, motion-blurred foreground, golden backlight through red maple canopy, cinematic 16:9.
items.result_alt: Happy Horse 1.0 anime warrior in autumn forest clip

faq_section.intro: Direct answers for people searching how Happy Horse 1.0 works, what it is good at, and when to use it in Dommi.

items.a: Happy Horse 1.0 is an AI video model from Alibaba. In Dommi, this page explains where it fits, shows prompt examples, and connects it with related video models so creators can choose the right workflow.

items.q: What is Happy Horse 1.0 best for?
items.a: Happy Horse 1.0 is best for creators who want to test Alibaba video generation against Seedance, Sora-style tools, and other open video models. Its main strengths are audio-video generation direction, motion-heavy short clips, open-model comparison value.

items.q: How do I prompt Happy Horse 1.0?
items.a: Describe the subject, camera path, action timing, environment, and whether the clip should feel cinematic, commercial, or social-first.

items.q: How is Happy Horse 1.0 different from related models?
items.a: Choose Happy Horse 1.0 when you want an open-video baseline with ambitious motion; compare it with Seedance 2.0 for cinematic control and LTX for open-source workflows.

items.q: Can I use a reference image with Happy Horse 1.0?
items.a: Yes. Use image-to-video when you already have a frame, product shot, character, or scene and want Happy Horse 1.0 to animate it with controlled camera and subject motion.

items.q: Can I compare Happy Horse 1.0 with other Dommi models?
items.a: Yes. Use the related model links on this page to compare Happy Horse 1.0 with nearby options, then reuse the same prompt so the difference between models is easier to judge.

final_cta.h2: Create with Happy Horse 1.0 in Dommi
final_cta.body: Open Dommi and test Happy Horse 1.0 against your strongest motion prompt.
